title: Moorelands and Properties: A Beacon of Trust in Oyo State’s Property Market - FinancialEDGE
description: Moorelands and Properties, a leading real estate company in Oyo State, is revolutionizing the way people buy and invest in land. html:
Moorelands and Properties, a leading real estate company in Oyo State, is revolutionizing the way people buy and invest in land.

With a commitment to transparency and customer satisfaction, the company has earned a reputation for providing peace of mind to its clients.

According to Moriregba Oreoluwa, the CEO of Moorelands and Properties, “Our goal is to monitor every client’s project from start to finish, ensuring everything is done correctly.” This dedication to excellence has earned the company the trust of its clients, who can now invest in land with confidence.

Moorelands offers a wide range of services, including land allocation, protection of investments, and assistance in finding the best locations. With over ten years of experience in the industry, the management team is well-equipped to meet clients’ needs.

The company has a diverse portfolio of properties, including popular areas like Jericho, Elebu/Akala, and Moniya new dryport/railway terminal.

Moorelands also offers options for agriculture and land banking, allowing clients to invest in larger plots of land for future returns.

With its commitment to transparency and customer satisfaction, Moorelands and Properties is the go-to destination for anyone looking to invest in land in Oyo State. As the company says, “Moorelands is a place where you can purchase land and, more importantly, find assurance in your property investment.”

 

Photo Caption: Moriregba Oreoluwa, CEO of Moorelands and Properties
